name: Olive Garden House Dressing (Updated)
recipeIngredient: 3 packets Sweet 'n' Low, or 1 tablespoon Sugar
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the vinegar, garlic, dried basil, dried oregano, and sweetener in a bottle.
2. Shake well to mix all ingredients thoroughly.
3. Allow the dressing to sit at room temperature for 24 hours before using.
